source: AD&D 2nd Edition Complete Handbook Series (PHBR1-15), Tome of Magic, Arms & Equipment Guide, Player's Options
description: Additional non-weapon proficiencies beyond the PHB, organized by source and category. These expand on the PHB non-weapon proficiency system.

rules_reminder.slot_costs: Most additional NWPs cost 1-3 slots; rare advanced skills cost 3+
rules_reminder.group_bonus: Characters get NWPs from their own group at listed cost; other groups cost 1 extra slot
rules_reminder.related_proficiencies: Some proficiencies have synergy bonuses with related skills
rules_reminder.check_method: Roll 1d20 against the relevant ability score + modifier for check-based proficiencies

warrior_additional.description: Additional warrior NWPs from Complete Fighter's Handbook and other sourcebooks

proficiencies.name: Armorer
proficiencies.description: Create and repair metal armor. Can craft chain mail in 1 month; plate in 3 months per piece. Repair time: 1 day per AC point of damage restored. Requires forge and materials.

proficiencies.name: Blindfighting
proficiencies.description: Fight effectively while blind or in total darkness. Negates all penalties for blindness in melee combat. Only -2 to hit instead of -4 (normal blindfighting penalty negated). Also allows detecting hidden and invisible creatures within 10 ft.

proficiencies.name: Charioteering
proficiencies.description: Drive and fight from a chariot. Prerequisite: Land-based Riding. Allows attacks from moving chariot at normal hit penalties. Perform chariot combat maneuvers. Required for chariot racing.

proficiencies.name: Expertise
proficiencies.description: Fighter-only. Master defensive fighting: choose one weapon and gain +2 AC when using that weapon defensively (not attacking). This comes at -2 to hit during defensive rounds. More versatile than Specialization for defense.

proficiencies.name: Jousting
proficiencies.description: Fight in formal lance jousting. Required for tournaments. Determines who is unhorsed, breaks lance, wins points. Does not aid regular combat.

proficiencies.name: Martial Arts
proficiencies.description: Unarmed combat style training. Level 1: 1d4 strike damage. Each additional slot: +1d4 and new techniques. Multiple styles exist (see Martial Arts tables). Advanced techniques include stunning, grappling, nerve strikes.

proficiencies.name: Mental Armor
proficiencies.description: Train the mind to resist psionic attack. +2 to all saves vs. psionic powers and mental magic. Also provides +1 to psionic defense mode if character has any psionic ability.

proficiencies.name: Mountaineering
proficiencies.description: Climb mountains and use alpine equipment. Required for leading a climbing party. Check to succeed at dangerous climbs. +2 to all climbing checks in mountain terrain.

proficiencies.name: Set Snares
proficiencies.description: Set snares and traps for game. Simple snares: automatic; complex spring traps: roll required. Setting time: 1 turn for simple, 1 hour for complex. Can also set trip wires and alarm traps.

proficiencies.name: Siege Engineering
proficiencies.description: Design, build, and operate siege equipment. Oversee construction of catapults, ballistae, battering rams. Required to build siege engines from scratch. Also covers fortification design.

proficiencies.name: Tactics, Land
proficiencies.description: Advanced land combat strategy. +1 to attack for units under command when tactics are used; allows flanking maneuvers, feints, tactical withdrawals. Required for organized army command.

proficiencies.name: Tumbling
proficiencies.description: Acrobatics and tumbling. +4 AC vs. one opponent when tumbling (cannot attack that round). Can fall up to 30 ft without damage on successful check. Can cross difficult terrain without penalty.

proficiencies.name: Weapon and Shield Style
proficiencies.description: Fighting style: use weapon and shield together efficiently. +1 AC from shield when fighting this style. When both hit, can attack with shield for 1d3 damage as free action.
proficiencies.prerequisite: Must have at least 1 slot in the relevant weapon

proficiencies.name: Weaponsmith
proficiencies.description: Forge and repair metal weapons. Can create swords, spears, axes, etc. Time: 1 week to 3 months depending on weapon complexity. Masterwork items require additional time and a proficiency check.

rogue_additional.description: Additional rogue NWPs from Complete Thief's Handbook and Bard's Handbook

proficiencies.name: Acting
proficiencies.description: Portray fictional characters convincingly. Successful check means performance believed as real. Can also pass as a specific individual if their mannerisms are studied (1 day minimum).

proficiencies.name: Appraising
proficiencies.description: Assess value of goods. Success: exact value; failure: 10-40% error. Expertise in specific item categories reduces error. Required for identifying magic items without Identify.

proficiencies.name: Begging
proficiencies.description: Effectively solicit charity. Earn 1d6 cp per day on success; 1d4 cp on failure. In wealthy areas: multiply by 10. Grants access to lower-class social information.

proficiencies.name: Bribery
proficiencies.description: Know when and how to offer a bribe for maximum effect. Failure may result in arrest. Determine right amount, right moment, and right method for a bribe.

proficiencies.name: Disguise
proficiencies.description: Create convincing disguises. Success: fooled all but very close inspection. Failure: 10% chance of detection per interaction. Disguising as specific person: -5. Different race: -10 without additional material.

proficiencies.name: Fast-Talking
proficiencies.description: Talk your way out of (or into) situations with quick clever talk. Success: target momentarily confused or distracted (1 round free action for allies or escape). Failure: target suspicious.

proficiencies.name: Forgery
proficiencies.description: Create forged documents, seals, and handwriting copies. Success: passes casual inspection. Success by 5+: passes expert inspection. Requires original sample to copy.

proficiencies.name: Gather Intelligence
proficiencies.description: Covertly gather information in a community. 1d4 days to research a specific subject. Success provides accurate general information; success by 5+ reveals specific secrets.

proficiencies.name: Hiding
proficiencies.description: Hide in shadows and cover without using Thief class ability. Non-thieves can attempt this. Gives +20% to basic Hide in Shadows attempt if also using Thief skill.

proficiencies.name: Jumping
proficiencies.description: Jump farther and higher than normal. Running: 3 ft horizontal per STR point above 9, vertical 1 ft per 5 STR over 9. Standing: half. Check required for unusual jumps.

proficiencies.name: Looting
proficiencies.description: Quickly search and loot a location. Success: find and take valuables in half the normal time. Failure: take normal time or miss something. Does not aid finding secret doors.

proficiencies.name: Pickpocketing
proficiencies.description: Non-thieves using this proficiency can attempt pickpocket as per a 1st-level thief. Thieves gain +10% to their existing Pick Pockets skill.
proficiencies.note: Non-thief characters only; thieves use their class skill

proficiencies.name: Poisoncraft
proficiencies.description: Identify, prepare, and apply poisons. Determine toxicity and effects. Create weak poisons from natural ingredients. Failure: poison ineffective; critical failure: accidentally poisoned.

proficiencies.name: Reading Lips
proficiencies.description: Read lips to understand conversations without hearing. Range: 30 ft with clear line of sight to speaker's mouth. Success: understand conversation; failure: understand about 50%.

proficiencies.name: Rope Use
proficiencies.description: Expert use of rope for climbing, tying, etc. Check to tie or escape knots; check to throw grappling hook accurately. +10% to Climb Walls when using rope.

proficiencies.name: Seamanship
proficiencies.description: Work as a sailor. Navigate small vessels. Sail in difficult weather. Required to sail effectively; failure in bad weather may capsize small boat.

proficiencies.name: Street Sense
proficiencies.description: Know the social structure of criminal elements in a city. Identify safe houses, criminal contacts, illegal goods sources. -2 to NPC reaction when dealing with underworld.

proficiencies.name: Tightrope Walking
proficiencies.description: Walk tightropes and balance on narrow surfaces. Move at half speed on tight surfaces without check. Full speed: check required. In combat on rope/beam: check to maintain footing each round.

proficiencies.name: Ventriloquism
proficiencies.description: Throw voice to appear to come from another location (up to 30 ft). Success: voice believed to come from intended location. Can also imitate voices with additional WIS check.

wizard_additional.description: Additional wizard NWPs from Complete Wizard's Handbook and Tome of Magic

proficiencies.name: Alchemy
proficiencies.description: Create potions, alchemical substances, and transmutations. 1 slot: create simple potions and acids. Additional slots enable complex alchemical substances. Requires lab (200+ gp setup).

proficiencies.name: Astrology
proficiencies.description: Read celestial patterns for divination. Success: +1 to any one roll per day (declare before rolling). Also: predict weather, determine lucky/unlucky days, +1 to Astronomy checks.

proficiencies.name: Brewing
proficiencies.description: Create alcoholic and herbal beverages. Success: quality beverage. Critical success: exceptional quality (10x value). Special brews can have mild magical properties with DM permission.

proficiencies.name: Calligraphy
proficiencies.description: Beautiful decorative writing. Makes scrolls and books more valuable. Required for creating certain magical writings. +1 to value of any book or document created.

proficiencies.name: Cantrip Mastery
proficiencies.description: Master use of minor magical tricks (cantrips). Can produce 1 of 12 simple magical effects at will: light, extinguish flame, clean, soil, dry, shine, sparkle, sound, mend, knot, flavor, freshen. No PSPs or spell slots required.

proficiencies.name: Concentration
proficiencies.description: Maintain concentration in adverse conditions. Can cast spells in moderate distractions without check. Severe distractions: check at +2. Also: maintain concentration 1 round longer than normal.

proficiencies.name: Cryptography
proficiencies.description: Create and decode encrypted messages. Design ciphers and codes. Chance to decode unknown cipher decreases with complexity. Required for creating secure magical correspondence.

proficiencies.name: Heraldry
proficiencies.description: Identify coats of arms, family symbols, and heraldic devices. Know the rank and allegiance of armored knights. Design heraldic devices. Aids in social situations with nobility.

proficiencies.name: Illumination
proficiencies.description: Create illuminated manuscripts with gold leaf and fine pigments. Doubles value of any book or scroll. Required for creating illuminated magical tomes. Reduces time to scribe scrolls by 10%.

proficiencies.name: Local History (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Know detailed history of a specific region or city beyond the base Local History proficiency. +2 to Local History checks in that area; know specific families, legendary items, and historical events.

proficiencies.name: Meditation
proficiencies.description: Achieve deeper states of mental relaxation. Recover 1 extra memorized spell per 4 hours of meditation. After successful check and 8 hours: memorize spells in 2 hours instead of 8.

proficiencies.name: Research
proficiencies.description: Academic research skills. Reduce time for learning new spells by 25%. Find useful information in libraries in half the normal time. +2 to all checks to identify spells and magic items.

proficiencies.name: Runecasting
proficiencies.description: Carve magical runes for divination and minor magical effects. Each rune requires material component and 1 hour to carve. Runes provide +1 bonus to specific activities (defense, offense, travel, etc.) for 1 day.

proficiencies.name: Spellcraft (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Advanced spellcraft beyond PHB. Modify spells as they are being cast to change certain parameters within limits. +2 to rolls to counter spells. Recognize spells being cast by others.

proficiencies.name: Spellsong
proficiencies.description: Bard-specific. Replace verbal and somatic components of spells with song. While singing: others within 30 ft must save vs. spell (-2) to know spells are being cast. Requires successful check to complete spellsong.

priest_additional.description: Additional priest NWPs from Complete Priest's Handbook and Tome of Magic

proficiencies.name: Ancient History
proficiencies.description: Know events and cultures of ancient times. Identify artifacts from ancient civilizations. +2 to checks involving ancient languages (but not speaking them). Good for research-focused priests.

proficiencies.name: Ceremony
proficiencies.description: Conduct religious ceremonies. When leading proper ceremony: +2 to NPC reaction with same religion; +1 morale to believers. Failed ceremony: -1 morale and -1 to reaction. Covers weddings, funerals, holy days.

proficiencies.name: Divine Lore
proficiencies.description: Extensive knowledge of the divine pantheon, divine hierarchy, and relationships between deities. +2 to checks involving identifying divine magic, relics, and divine beings. Essential for priests.

proficiencies.name: Faith Healing
proficiencies.description: Through prayer and ritual, assist non-magical healing. Patient must have same faith. Success: patient heals at twice the normal rate. Does not require spell use. Works alongside magical healing.

proficiencies.name: Incantation
proficiencies.description: Ritual prayer knowledge. When performing extended ritual (1 hour+), gain +1 spell level for one casting. Rarely: allow casting of a spell that is not memorized (very specific circumstances).

proficiencies.name: Meditate
proficiencies.description: Priest-specific meditation to commune with deity. Once per day: ask deity one yes/no question; success required. Failure: no answer. Critical success: detailed response. Works as weaker Commune.

proficiencies.name: Prayer
proficiencies.description: Regular structured prayer practice. When performed daily: +1 to one saving throw category for the day. Counts as performing the Prayer spell when combined with Ceremony proficiency.

proficiencies.name: Preaching
proficiencies.description: Deliver effective sermons. Success: all listeners of the same faith gain +1 morale for the day. Success by 5+: listeners inspired (+2 to one roll that day). Effective to sway crowds to the faith.

proficiencies.name: Sacred Legends
proficiencies.description: Know myths, legends, and lore of specific deity. +2 to checks involving that deity's domains. Can identify divine artifacts and holy sites of that deity. Also: +1 to Ceremony within that deity's purview.

proficiencies.name: Shamanism (basic)
proficiencies.description: Basics of spirit world interaction. Detect spirit presence; make simple offerings; basic knowledge of spirit domains. Required before Spirit Speak and other advanced shamanic skills.

proficiencies.name: Spirit Speak
proficiencies.description: Communicate with spirits of the dead and nature spirits. Requires Shamanism (basic). Spirits are not compelled to answer. Duration: 1d6 questions. Spirits may lie, mislead, or refuse.

proficiencies.name: Theology
proficiencies.description: Advanced religious philosophy and religious law. Can adjudicate religious disputes. Know theological arguments for and against various positions. +2 to Ceremony and Sacred Legends.

proficiencies.name: Voodoo
proficiencies.description: Create and use voodoo dolls and similar sympathetic magic. Effects on doll: 50% chance affects target (save vs. death magic at -2 negates). Range: unlimited if hair or blood is used. Dark practice.

general_additional.description: Additional general NWPs applicable to all classes from various sourcebooks

proficiencies.name: Animal Empathy (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Extended from PHB. Soothe and calm animals in distress. Communicate simple concepts (yes/no, danger/safety) to domestic animals. Wild animals: check at -4. Not for monster-class animals.

proficiencies.name: Artistic Ability (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Specific to one art form beyond the base proficiency. Specializations include: sculpture, landscape painting, portraiture, tapestry weaving, glassblowing, woodcarving. Better work commands premium prices.

proficiencies.name: Boating
proficiencies.description: Row or paddle small watercraft. Different from Seamanship (which covers sailing ships). Navigate rivers and calm coastal waters. +2 to checks in rapids and rough water with specialization.

proficiencies.name: Book Learning
proficiencies.description: Rapid learner from written text. Can learn an additional NWP from any book given 1d6+2 weeks study time, without spending NWP slots. Must have access to appropriate books. Books cost 15-150 gp depending on rarity.

proficiencies.name: Camouflage
proficiencies.description: Create effective camouflage in wilderness settings. Provide 90% concealment for self and 4 others using natural materials. Takes 1 hour. Specific terrain: check at +2. Different terrain: check at -2.

proficiencies.name: Cartography
proficiencies.description: Create accurate maps. Maps drawn with this proficiency have 90% accuracy on distance and direction. Without proficiency: accuracy is 60%. Also: read and interpret maps (+2 to navigation checks).

proficiencies.name: Climate Knowledge
proficiencies.description: Deep knowledge of weather patterns in specific region. Predict weather 48 hours out with 70% accuracy (check to predict). Also: optimal planting/travel times. Required for longer range predictions.

proficiencies.name: Craft (specify)
proficiencies.description: Master a specific craft beyond those in PHB: Glassblowing, Pottery, Tapestry Weaving, Leatherworking, Bone Carving, Candle Making, Gem Cutting. Each craft is a separate proficiency. Quality goods sell at 110-150% market price.

proficiencies.name: Dark Sight
proficiencies.description: Train natural vision to better operate in dim light conditions. Reduce any dark/dim light penalties by 1 (minimum 0). Cannot gain infravision without magic if not born with it.

proficiencies.name: Disease Identification
proficiencies.description: Identify diseases by symptoms. Know common treatments and prognosis. Can isolate infected individuals appropriately. Works alongside Healing proficiency. Does not cure: only identifies and advises treatment.

proficiencies.name: Etiquette
proficiencies.description: Know the social customs of various classes and cultures. Avoid social blunders in courts and formal settings. +2 to reaction with nobility and royalty when applying proper etiquette.

proficiencies.name: Fire Building
proficiencies.description: Build fires in adverse conditions: wet wood, wind, rain. Success time: 1d4 rounds. Failure: 2d4 rounds and try again. In rain: check at -2. Produces minimal smoke, useful for stealth.

proficiencies.name: Gem Cutting
proficiencies.description: Cut and polish gemstones. A rough gem is worth 50-75% of a cut gem. Success increases value to full market price. Critical success: flawless cut adds 20-50% premium. Failure: may reduce gem value.

proficiencies.name: Haggling
proficiencies.description: Negotiate better prices. Success: buy at 10% below market value or sell at 10% above. Success by 5+: 20% margin. Failure: merchant suspects motive, standard price. One attempt per merchant per day.

proficiencies.name: Herbal Healing (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Advanced herbalism focusing on medicinal plants. Prepare herbal cures: neutralize poison (50% chance), slow disease progression. Daily preparation: 1 hour. Effective in regions where the herbs grow. Requires Herbalism.

proficiencies.name: History, Secret
proficiencies.description: Know the secret history of criminal, political, and conspiracy events. This hidden history is not in official records. Identify secret societies and organizations by their symbols. Know the 'real' history.

proficiencies.name: Ice Navigation
proficiencies.description: Navigate in arctic conditions on ice floes, glaciers, and frozen wastes. Know ice bridge safety, predicting ice breaks, navigating blizzards. Required for arctic exploration.

proficiencies.name: Intimidation
proficiencies.description: Intimidate NPCs through physical threat (STR) or force of personality (CHA). Success: target cooperates for 1d6 turns. Failure: target refuses and is angered. High-level NPCs resistant (check at -4).

proficiencies.name: Knowledge, Arcane Lore
proficiencies.description: Broad knowledge of magical theory, history, and famous wizards. Identify magical effects by observation. +2 to Spellcraft. Know weaknesses of common magical constructs.

proficiencies.name: Knowledge, Monster Lore
proficiencies.description: Extensive knowledge of monsters: abilities, weaknesses, habitats. Check when encountering unknown monster to recall relevant information. Success: DM reveals key weakness or ability.

proficiencies.name: Knowledge, Planar
proficiencies.description: Know the planes of existence: their geography, residents, hazards. Navigate planar portals. Know how to survive on specific planes. Required for confident extra-planar travel.

proficiencies.name: Law
proficiencies.description: Know legal codes of a specific region. Argue a case in court. Identify legal loopholes. +2 to social checks when invoking legal rights. Useful for avoiding arbitrary arrests.

proficiencies.name: Leadership
proficiencies.description: Lead groups effectively. Followers gain +1 morale when under direct leadership. Recruit 1d4+CHA bonus additional followers above normal level limits. Required for managing large organizations.

proficiencies.name: Lip Reading (alternative name: Read Lips)
proficiencies.description: See under Rogue section (Rogue and non-rogue version identical)

proficiencies.name: Literacy (extended languages)
proficiencies.description: Learn to read and write in languages already known. Provides ability to read ancient scripts and dead languages. +2 to research involving written text in those languages.

proficiencies.name: Mending
proficiencies.description: Repair torn and damaged items: clothing, leather goods, and light materials. More complex than just Sewing. Reduce damage severity of worn equipment. Extend life of worn materials significantly.

proficiencies.name: Orienteering
proficiencies.description: Navigate using terrain features, stars, and natural signs. +2 to all Navigation checks. Can navigate without compass or astrolabe. Determine location within 10 miles by examining terrain.

proficiencies.name: Persuasion
proficiencies.description: Persuade others through argument and appeal. Success: target considers the argument favorably; may change attitude 1 step. Failure: target unmoved. Cannot compel; only persuade.

proficiencies.name: Planar Survival
proficiencies.description: Survive on specific planes of existence. Know how to find food, water, shelter on particular planes. Avoid natural planar hazards. Reduce environmental damage from planar conditions by half.

proficiencies.name: Psychology
proficiencies.description: Understand mental and emotional motivations. Read emotional states beyond Empathy. Predict NPC behavior. +2 to reaction rolls when applying psychological insight to negotiations.

proficiencies.name: Riding, Exotic
proficiencies.description: Ride exotic mounts: griffons, pegasi, hippogriffs, wyverns, dragons (if trained), giant eagles. Each mount type may require separate proficiency. Attack from mount at -2 instead of -4.

proficiencies.name: Sign Language
proficiencies.description: Communicate silently with hand signs. Silent communication with up to 30 sentences of meaning. Useful for dungeon stealth. Party communication without verbal commands.

proficiencies.name: Survival (expanded)
proficiencies.description: Additional survival terrain type beyond PHB. Each slot adds: Arctic, Desert, Jungle, Underwater, or Swamp survival expertise.

proficiencies.name: Teaching
proficiencies.description: Effectively teach others. Students with this instructor learn 15% faster. Can train others in any proficiency the teacher possesses. Reduce training time for NWPs by 25%.

proficiencies.name: Tracking, Urban
proficiencies.description: Track targets through city environments. Follow someone through a city by questioning witnesses, finding evidence of passage, and using local knowledge. Different from wilderness tracking.

proficiencies.name: Weather Sense (advanced)
proficiencies.description: Expanded from PHB. Predict weather 72 hours out (check). Read signs of dangerous weather (no roll required). Identify storm severity and direction. +2 to Navigation in poor weather.

proficiencies.name: Whistling/Humming
proficiencies.description: Expert whistling and humming. Bards can use this to produce Bard Song effects silently without revealing identity as a bard. Non-bards: produce simple melodies for entertainment (+1 to busking income).

secondary_skills.description: Secondary skills represent a character's background occupation before adventuring. These are different from NWPs but can grant similar knowledge.
rules: Roll d100 or choose a secondary skill during character creation
Secondary skills provide background knowledge useful for roleplay
They do not grant formal proficiency but do grant applicable knowledge checks at base ability with no modifier
DM may grant specific benefits based on skill relevance

list.name: Bowyer/Fletcher
list.knowledge: Make bows and arrows; know how to find bow wood

list.name: Farmer
list.knowledge: Agriculture, crop knowledge, seasonal activities, weather signs

list.name: Fisher
list.knowledge: Fishing techniques, boat use, knots, coastal/river knowledge

list.name: Forester
list.knowledge: Woodland work, logging, identifying trees and terrain

list.name: Gambler
list.knowledge: Games of chance, sleight of hand, reading faces, probability

list.name: Groom/Hostler
list.knowledge: Animal care, horse handling, identifying horse quality

list.name: Hunter
list.knowledge: Game trails, prey behavior, hunting techniques, skinning

list.name: Laborer/Servant
list.knowledge: Physical work, household tasks, social lower-class customs

list.name: Merchant
list.knowledge: Trade goods values, merchant customs, market knowledge

list.name: Miner
list.knowledge: Mining techniques, ore identification, underground stability

list.name: Noble/Courtier
list.knowledge: Etiquette, heraldry, court customs, political relationships

list.name: Scholar/Scribe
list.knowledge: Academic research, writing, common knowledge access

list.name: Soldier
list.knowledge: Military customs, tactics, unit organization, discipline

list.name: Tailor/Weaver
list.knowledge: Fabric identification, tailoring, fashion, cloth quality

list.name: Teamster/Wagoner
list.knowledge: Wagon maintenance, draft animal care, road conditions

list.name: Trapper/Furrier
list.knowledge: Setting traps, pelt quality, animal behavior, wilderness signs

list.name: Woodcutter
list.knowledge: Forest work, lumber quality, terrain navigation, camp setup
